<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>缘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>故<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>凭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>凭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>跌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diē</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>绊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bàn</rt></ruby><ruby>脚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>石<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>热<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rè</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>想<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>。
